## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (correcting incorrect SQL syntax)
- [ ] New content (adding new dialect or module files)
- [ ] Content improvement (enriching existing files with deeper analysis)
- [ ] Infrastructure (CI, tooling, documentation)

## Files Changed

(List the key files changed and what was modified)

## Checklist

- [ ] SQL syntax is correct and can be executed in the target database
- [ ] Version annotations are accurate (e.g., `MySQL 8.0+`, `PostgreSQL 12+`)
- [ ] References link to official documentation
- [ ] `_comparison.md` has been updated (if adding new features or changing existing ones)
- [ ] Content includes design decision analysis (WHY, not just HOW)
- [ ] Content includes cross-dialect comparison
